pageProps.data:
归并排序

归并排序的归是递归的意思，并是将分化的半数组并在一起。

function mergeSort(arr) { let length = arr.length;if (length < 2) return arr;let middle = Math.floor(length / 2), left = arr.slice(0, middle), right = arr.slice(middle);return __merge(mergeSort(left), mergeSort(right));}function __merge(left, right) {let result = [];while (left.length && right.length) {if (left[0] <= right[0]) result.push(left.shift());else result.push(right.shift());}while (left.length) result.push(left.shift());while (right.length) result.push(right.shift());return result;}

看了半天才大概看懂。。。

最佳情况：T(n) = O(n)；最差情况：T(n) = O(nlogn)；平均：T(n) = O(nlogn)。
